g.text: For each enabled pattern, run detector:
Config defines severity levels per dialect (sqlite vs postgresql).
Custom severity levels supported (critical, high, p0, blocker, etc.)
Boolean flags (fast filtering) + JSON list (detailed inspection)
🔴 Critical: -30 pts | ⚠️ High: -15 pts | 🔵 Medium: -5 pts | 🟢 Low: -2 pts
failed: unparseable | warns: has antipatterns | ok: clean

svg.text: Architecture supports flexible, dialect-aware antipattern detection with configurable severity levels
